app.title: Sekwencer PA
dashboard.title: Panel
config.title: Konfiguracja
config.section_fault_desc: Limity wyzwalające automatyczne wyłączenie PA. Po przekroczeniu progu sekwencer przechodzi w stan awarii i wyłącza przekaźnik PA.
config.section_pa_desc: Określa, który przekaźnik steruje wzmacniaczem mocy. Sekwencer wyłącza ten przekaźnik w przypadku awarii.
config.section_power_desc: Parametry logarytmicznego detektora mocy RF na każdym porcie sprzęgacza kierunkowego. Detektor wytwarza napięcie proporcjonalne do dBm.
config.section_divider_desc: Wartości dzielnika rezystancyjnego na każdym wejściu ADC. Firmware oblicza napięcie przed dzielnikiem. Ustaw oba na 0, aby wyłączyć korekcję.
config.section_therm_desc: Parametry termistora NTC (równanie Steinhart-Hart). Schemat: VCC → R Series → NTC → GND, ADC mierzy napięcie na NTC.
config.tip_swr_threshold: SWR above this value triggers a fault. Only checked when forward power exceeds 0.5 W.
config.tip_temp1_threshold: PA temperature sensor 1 limit. Fault triggers when exceeded.
config.tip_temp2_threshold: PA temperature sensor 2 limit. Fault triggers when exceeded.
config.tip_pa_relay: Relay number (1–6) that switches the PA. This relay is forced off during fault state.
config.tip_fwd_slope: Detector slope in mV per dB. Negative for detectors with falling output (e.g. −25 for AD8307).
config.tip_fwd_intercept: Detector output at 0 dBm, in dBm. Sets the baseline of the log-linear transfer function.
config.tip_fwd_coupling: Directional coupler coupling factor in dB (negative, e.g. −30). Added back to get main-line power.
config.tip_fwd_atten: External attenuation between coupler port and detector input, in dB. 0 if none.
config.tip_ref_slope: Same as FWD Slope, for the reflected power detector.
config.tip_ref_intercept: Same as FWD Intercept, for the reflected power detector.
config.tip_ref_coupling: Same as FWD Coupling, for the reflected coupler port.
config.tip_ref_atten: Same as FWD Attenuator, for the reflected path.
config.tip_adc_1a_r_top: Top resistor in the forward power ADC input divider.
config.tip_adc_1a_r_bottom: Bottom resistor in the forward power ADC input divider.
config.tip_adc_1b_r_top: Top resistor in the reflected power ADC input divider.
config.tip_adc_1b_r_bottom: Bottom resistor in the reflected power ADC input divider.
config.tip_adc_0a_r_top: Top resistor for chip 0 channel A input divider.
config.tip_adc_0a_r_bottom: Bottom resistor for chip 0 channel A input divider.
config.tip_adc_0b_r_top: Top resistor for chip 0 channel B input divider.
config.tip_adc_0b_r_bottom: Bottom resistor for chip 0 channel B input divider.
config.tip_adc_0c_r_top: Top resistor for chip 0 channel C input divider.
config.tip_adc_0c_r_bottom: Bottom resistor for chip 0 channel C input divider.
config.tip_adc_0d_r_top: Top resistor for chip 0 channel D input divider.
config.tip_adc_0d_r_bottom: Bottom resistor for chip 0 channel D input divider.
config.tip_therm_beta: Steinhart-Hart beta coefficient. Typical: 3950 for 100k NTC.
config.tip_therm_r0: NTC resistance at 25°C in ohms. Typical: 100000 for a 100k thermistor.
config.tip_therm_rseries: Fixed series resistor in the voltage divider, in ohms. Must match the physical resistor on the board.
